---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: konkomaji
---

## Problem / Use Case
What problem does this feature solve? What workflow does it improve?
(e.g. "As a freelancer managing 10 WP sites, I need to...")

## Proposed Solution
Describe the feature clearly. How would it work? What would the UI look like?

## Alternatives Considered
Have you considered any other approaches? Why is this the best solution?

## Who Would Use This?
- [ ] Solo freelancer
- [ ] Small agency (2–5 people)
- [ ] Large agency (5+ people)
- [ ] All of the above

## Additional Context
Any mockups, examples from other tools, or relevant links.
